script.title: 60-Second Ad Script for bash

scenes.visual: Close-up of stressed business owner looking at failed ads
scenes.audio: Narrator: 'Stop wasting thousands on ads that never convert?'

scenes.visual: Split screen - traditional marketing vs AI solution
scenes.audio: Narrator: 'What if you could predict exactly what your customers want? Our AI analyzes millions of data points to create perfect ads.'

scenes.audio: Narrator: 'No more guesswork. Just enter your product, and get professional ads in minutes. Join 10,000+ businesses already growing.'

scenes.visual: Testimonial-style clips with happy business owners
scenes.audio: Narrator: "Sarah from e-commerce saw 3x ROI in 30 days. Mark doubled his conversions. You can too."

scenes.visual: Product dashboard with prominent CTA button
scenes.audio: Narrator: 'Start your free trial today at [URL]. No credit card required. Transform your marketing in just 60 seconds.'
